class.name: JustAMCPPromptBlaziumWorkflow
class.description: [JustAMCPPromptBlaziumWorkflow] backs the high-value JustAMCP workflow prompts for project intake, scene building, runtime testing, Autowork repair, and diagnostics triage. The prompts embed relevant [code]blazium://[/code] resources and guide MCP clients through deterministic tool sequences.
